Create WIC Health Account Online
Need to create an account at wichealth.org? In just a few quick steps you can be up your account, complete your nutrition education, and receive your WIC benefits.

Video Guide: How to Create a wichealth.org Account
Watch this step-by-step video to learn how to register your online profile and begin your WIC nutrition education. This video includes a built-in interactive transcript for accessibility. To view the text version while watching,
click the "Transcript" button
(the page icon).
Note: This video is in English with an English transcript available within the player.
